mapper.select: SELECT message_id, chat_id, role, content, message_type, tool_calls, metadata, create_time, embedding, keywords, sentiment, topic_category FROM ai_chat_message WHERE chat_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_chat_message ( chat_id, role, content, message_type, tool_calls, metadata, create_time, embedding, keywords, sentiment, topic_category ) VALUES
( #{message.chatId}, #{message.role}, #{message.content}, #{message.messageType}, #{message.toolCalls}, #{message.metadata}, #{message.createTime}, #{message.embedding}, #{message.keywords}, #{message.sentiment}, #{message.topicCategory} )
mapper.select: SELECT m.message_id, m.chat_id, m.role, m.content, m.message_type, m.tool_calls, m.metadata, m.create_time, m.embedding, m.keywords, m.sentiment, m.topic_category FROM ai_chat_message m INNER JOIN ai_chat_session s ON m.chat_id = s.chat_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT message_id, chat_id, role, content, message_type, tool_calls, metadata, create_time, embedding, keywords, sentiment, topic_category FROM ai_chat_message m INNER JOIN ai_chat_session s ON m.chat_id = s.chat_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND m.create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY m.create_time ASC
